check_rows.detail: loss-suffix replay regression diagnostic must be ready
patch only applies when sample success and contract failure coexist
completion surface must be the regressed surface
patch expects a zero-hit regression against baseline
completion stabilization should dominate carry-forward examples

interpretation.reason: The patch targets the completion-label zero-hit regression while carrying forward answer surfaces.
